ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-19-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Continued To Apr-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Roger Meredith for and with (administrator) Naomi Sanders.

The Court stated that there are complications due to distributions being made without a court order, that payment was made to the attorney without a court order, that the former wife collected assets, that the administrator says that it is not cost effective to pursue and that there is a stipulation regarding attorney's fees. Mr. Meredith stated that he is here because it is his firm, that a former attorney did this, that it is a small estate with complications, that he had to defend a law suit which incurred $20,000.00 in fees before filing the probate action, gave a brief scenario to the court of the former wife's actions, that the original appraisal of the property was double what they ended up selling it for, that HUD could not find the paperwork, that the City Attorney never got the paperwork, that they received very little money from the sale. Mr. Meredith further stated that he knows there should have been an order, that his associate should have known the same and that it is all laid out in his declaration. The Court stated that there have been overpayments and that the administrator will be taking them from her share of the statutory fees, that it will have to consider the extraordinary fee request and that it cannot be bound by the stipulation. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (134 Dolphin Ct. San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Feb-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for (administrator) Naomi Sanders.

The sale was confirmed at $285,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the 3rd amended report of sale filed December 23, 2014. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (134 Dolphin Ct. San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Continued To Feb-03-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for Naomi Sanders.

Mr. Ward requested a continuance until the end of January stating that he was unable to get publication of notice. The Report of Sale and Petition for Confirmation of Sale of Real Property was continued to February 3, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (134 Dolphin Ct. San Francisco, Ca 94124)
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Continued To Dec-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for Naomi Sanders.

The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to December 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proof of publication of the notice of sale.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
